monster.name: Corrupted Rat

trait.name: Keen Smell
trait.text: advantage on Perception checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
trait.text: advantage on attack rolls if an ally is within 1qd of the target and isn't incapacitated.

monster.description: Giant rat with red eyes and unnatural behavior. More aggressive than a normal rat, attacks in packs without fear. Nature DC 10 to understand it's corrupted, not simply rabid.
